details.name: B1: Segment map built correctly
B2: Transcript format includes IDs
B3: Valid ID resolution
B4: Invalid ID returns False in map lookup
B5: Fallback to raw timestamps when IDs invalid
C1: Words during hook filtered out
C2: Safety fallback when ALL words filtered
C3: Empty words → empty result (no crash)
C4: Word at start=0.0 filtered by hook
C5: Word at exactly hook boundary (start=3.0) passes
D1: No persons detected → triggers fallback
D2: Single person static → crop range < 50px
D3: Single person moving → crop range > 50px → smooth pan
D4: Two speakers detected → multi_ratio >= 0.7
D5: Target 16:9 → skip YOLO (passthrough)
D6: Target 1:1 → center crop (no YOLO)
E1: Reframed clip preferred over base
E2: Hooked clip NEVER used (even if exists)
E3: Falls back to base when reframed missing
A1: Normal 5-min video (20 seg, 3 clips)
A2: Long 30-min video (200 seg, 5 clips)
A3: Very short 30s video (3 seg)
details.detail: Got 0 clips (OK if 0 — video too short)

details.name: A4: Single segment video
A5: Empty transcript (0 segments)
A6: Unicode/special characters
A7: Overlapping timestamps
